video_prompt.input_subject: The person in the picture is wearing the exact same sunglasses as in the photo.
video_prompt.subject: A beautiful female model is wearing the same sunglasses as in the picture. The young woman has long, straight dark hair, bold well-defined eyebrows, full glossy lips, and is accessorized with a large hoop earrings.
video_prompt.action: The person strikes a pose, placing one hand behind her head. She then lowers her arm and turns her head smoothly to face the camera, adjusting the sunglasses slightly with one finger as she does.
video_prompt.scene: Minimalist studio with a solid light grey background.
video_prompt.camera_angles_and_movements: Starts as a wide shot to capture the pose, then jump cuts to a close-up on her face as she looks at the camera. Static camera for both the wide and close-up shots.

video_prompt.input_subject: The person in the picture is wearing the exact same eyeglasses as in the photo.
video_prompt.subject: A beautiful female model in her late 20s has long brunette hair and is wearing the same eyeglasses as in the picture. The eyeglasses look just like the picture in every details.
video_prompt.action: The person begins by looking down thoughtfully, as if reading for a couple of seconds. She then slowly raises her head and her eyes meet the camera with a direct and intelligent gaze holding it in a frontal stare.
video_prompt.scene: Clean, minimalist studio environment with a uniform, soft grey background.
video_prompt.camera_angles_and_movements: A static close-up shot, framed from the chest up.
video_prompt.lighting: Uniform lighting and no reflection on lenses.
